barix.blurb: Icomply Property Services designs, installs and maintains Barix IP audio and intercom solutions for residential blocks, commercial premises and multi-site estates across the North West. From SIP door stations and paging to retrofit upgrades on ageing analogue loops, our engineers commission systems that integrate cleanly with existing networks and access control. Landlords, FM teams and trade partners can also source Barix-compatible spares, cabling kits and engineer consumables for planned maintenance rounds in Greater Manchester, Lancashire, Cheshire and Merseyside.

baxi.blurb: Icomply Property Services supports Baxi boilers and gas systems for landlords, housing associations and commercial clients throughout the North West. Gas Safe engineers handle installation, annual servicing, breakdown repair and system upgrades, with clear certification and compliance paperwork for every job. We also supply trade service kits, flue accessories and common Baxi consumables so contractors and in-house teams can keep plant rooms and domestic boilers running reliably across Stockport, Manchester and the wider region.

beghelli.blurb: Icomply Property Services installs, tests and maintains Beghelli emergency lighting for commercial, residential and public buildings across the North West. Our team delivers BS 5266-aligned design, commissioning and periodic inspection, plus reactive call-outs when fittings fail monthly or annual tests. Trade customers can order LED emergency luminaires, battery packs and exit signage kits suited to Beghelli systems serving landlords, FM providers and contractors in Greater Manchester, Cheshire, Lancashire and Merseyside.

bilco.blurb: Icomply Property Services installs and services Bilco access hatches, smoke vents and related AOV equipment for multi-storey residential and commercial buildings across the North West. We support smoke-control compliance under BS 9991 and EN 12101, covering new installs, actuator replacement and planned maintenance of roof and stairwell systems. FM teams and trade partners can source Bilco-compatible control spares, actuators and consumables for estates in Greater Manchester, Lancashire, Cheshire and Merseyside.
